title: Our History
subtitle: From our beginnings, we have been committed to technological excellence and customer satisfaction.

forge.title: The Engineer's Forge
forge.description: Years of self-taught immersion in full-cycle engineering: from repairing power electronics and generators to assembling drones and control systems with Arduino and Raspberry Pi.

lab.title: Building the Laboratory
lab.description: Investment and assembly of the ROKE R&D lab core: high-performance workstations, managed network infrastructure, and acquisition of digital fabrication tools (CNC, 3D Printing).

infra.title: Birth of the Infrastructure
infra.description: Design and construction of our private data center, assembling an enterprise-grade Xeon-based server to power our future hosting operations and cloud services.

founding.title: Founding of ROKE Industries
founding.description: Official launch of ROKE Industries, the culmination of years of hands-on experience and the consolidation of a cutting-edge technology lab to serve our clients with real, proven solutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Empower creators and innovators with full-cycle technological solutions, from robust cloud infrastructure to hardware prototype manufacturing, accelerating the journey from idea to reality.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the fundamental technology partner for the next generation of startups and companies, recognized not only for our services but for our ability to build the tools that build the future.

principles.title: Our Values
principles.description: The curiosity of the engineer, the precision of the craftsman and the transparency of the partner. We build with excellence, obsess over reliability and believe in the power of technology to solve real problems.
